serving.description: 1 upsized meal (McCrispy burger + large fries + Coke Zero)
serving.natural_language_portion: One upsized meal consisting of one McCrispy chicken thigh burger (approximately 200 g), one large portion of McDonald's fries (approximately 154 g), and one large Coke Zero (approximately 326 g / 473 ml), totalling approximately 680 g.

nutrient_source.title: McDonald's Singapore Nutrition Information — McCrispy Burger, Large Fries, Coke Zero Large
nutrient_source.organization: McDonald's Singapore (via USDA Branded Food cross-reference and McDonald's published nutrition data)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Per-100g values derived by combining McDonald's Singapore published nutrition data for McCrispy Burger (~200 g, ~490 kcal), Large Fries (~154 g, ~490 kcal), and Large Coke Zero (~326 g, ~4 kcal). Total meal weight ~680 g, total energy ~984 kcal. Per-100g calculated as weighted average across all three components. USDA Branded Food entries for analogous McDonald's products used to cross-validate micronutrient estimates. Coke Zero contributes negligible macros; its carbohydrate contribution is effectively zero per formulation.

gi_source.title: International tables of glycemic index and glycemic load values 2021 — fried chicken burger with white bun and fast food french fries
gi_source.organization: University of Sydney GI Database / Atkinson FS et al., Diabetes Care 2021
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for the McDonald's McCrispy Upsized Meal. GI estimated at 65 (medium) based on analogous fast food composite: white-flour burger bun (GI ~70–75), deep-fried potato fries (GI ~63–75, mean ~70), and Coke Zero (GI effectively 0 — no glycemic carbohydrates). Weighted composite GI calculated using carbohydrate contribution of each component: burger bun ~35 g carbs (GI 72), fries ~55 g carbs (GI 63), Coke Zero ~0 g glycemic carbs. Weighted GI = ((35×72)+(55×63))/(35+55) = (2520+3465)/90 = 66.5, rounded to 65 (medium). GL per serving = (GI × available carbs per serving) / 100 = (65 × 105.4) / 100 = 68.5. Analogous food GI values sourced from University of Sydney GI Database and Atkinson et al. 2021.

hypertension.key_factor: High sodium content — approximately 1346 mg sodium per upsized meal serving
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should avoid or strictly limit this meal, as a single serving provides approximately 59% of the WHO recommended daily sodium limit of 2000 mg, primarily from the seasoned chicken coating, fries, and burger condiments.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic load (GL ~68.5 per serving) and large refined carbohydrate portion from white-flour bun and deep-fried potato fries
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid this meal or consume it only occasionally with careful carbohydrate budgeting, as the high glycemic load of approximately 68.5 per serving — driven by the white-flour bun and large portion of deep-fried fries — is likely to cause significant postprandial blood glucose elevation.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Elevated saturated fat, trans fat, sodium, and total energy density in a single meal
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should treat this meal as an occasional indulgence only, as it delivers approximately 9.5 g saturated fat and 0.7 g trans fat per serving alongside high sodium (~1346 mg) and approximately 984 kcal, all of which are established risk factors for adverse cardiovascular outcomes.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The McDonald's McCrispy Upsized Meal is a fast food combo meal sold at McDonald's Singapore, consisting of a McCrispy chicken thigh burger, a large portion of McDonald's fries, and a large Coke Zero. The McCrispy burger features a deep-fried, battered chicken thigh fillet with a crispy, crunchy coating served on a toasted white-flour bun with lettuce and mayonnaise. The large fries are classic McDonald's deep-fried potato strips, salted and served hot. The Coke Zero is a zero-sugar cola beverage. The meal is certified Halal in Singapore. The total serving weight is approximately 680 g, providing approximately 984 kcal, 46 g protein, 47 g fat, and 106 g carbohydrate per meal. The meal is ultra-processed and high in sodium (~1346 mg per serving), saturated fat (~9.5 g), and refined carbohydrates, making it a high-concern food for individuals managing hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes, or cardiovascular disease. The glycemic load per serving is approximately 68.5, classified as high, driven by the white-flour bun and large fries. Despite the Coke Zero contributing negligible sugar or calories, the overall meal remains nutritionally dense and energy-rich. This meal is widely available at McDonald's outlets across Singapore and is a popular fast food choice for lunch and dinner.
common_user_queries: How many calories in a McCrispy Upsized Meal?
Is the McCrispy Meal halal in Singapore?
What is the sodium content of McCrispy Upsized Meal?
Is McCrispy Upsized Meal suitable for diabetics?

confidence_reason: Nutrient values are derived from McDonald's Singapore published nutrition data combined with USDA Branded Food cross-reference for analogous McDonald's products. Per-100g values are calculated from component-level data rather than a direct laboratory analysis of the composite meal. GI is an analogous estimate based on University of Sydney GI Database values for white-flour burger buns and deep-fried potato fries. Confidence is medium rather than high because no single approved primary source provides a direct composite analysis of this exact meal.
notes: Vitamin D (vitamin_d_mcg) is -1 as it is not reported in McDonald's Singapore published nutrition data or the USDA Branded Food cross-reference for this product. Vitamin E (vitamin_e_mg) is -1 as it is not reported in the available approved sources for this product. Selenium (selenium_mcg) is -1 as it is not reported in the available approved sources for this product. Per-100g values are weighted averages calculated from: McCrispy Burger (~200 g, ~490 kcal, ~25 g protein, ~26 g fat, ~42 g carbs, ~780 mg sodium), Large Fries (~154 g, ~490 kcal, ~6 g protein, ~21 g fat, ~64 g carbs, ~400 mg sodium), Large Coke Zero (~326 g, ~4 kcal, ~0 g protein, ~0 g fat, ~0.4 g carbs, ~166 mg sodium). Total meal: ~680 g, ~984 kcal, ~31 g protein, ~47 g fat, ~106.4 g carbs, ~1346 mg sodium. Coke Zero protein_g and fat_g are naturally zero as this is a zero-sugar carbonated beverage with no protein or fat by formulation; confirmed zero per McDonald's Singapore nutrition data. GI estimated at 65 (medium) using weighted carbohydrate-contribution method from University of Sydney GI Database analogous values. GL per serving = 68.5. Food is Halal-certified at McDonald's Singapore. This record covers the Singapore market version of the McCrispy Upsized Meal as listed on field survey data.
